title: gyrosphragma santos-limae
intro: Gyrosphragma santos-limae is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a shrub with medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have various medicinal benefits. Gyrosphragma santos-limae is used to treat conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and antipyretic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and decoctions, are used in traditional medicine to promote health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
